sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 17:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 17:1
items.html: When the light overcomes the limiting screen that stands in its way, it is called breaching. It means that it completely ignores the boundary that stands in its way, breaks a passage, and shines through the boundary downward. (Part 3, Chapter 7, item 1)
